title: PriceList
description: User-editable ~/.throughline/prices.json for the OPTIONAL dollar-cost estimate. Ships empty (or absent). With no prices, no dollar figure is shown anywhere. Prices are user-provided and never fetched (Local-Only). A model in the data but absent here is reported 'unpriced' — never guessed.

effective.description: date these prices are valid as-of (YYYY-MM-DD); shown in the estimate's label

unit.description: how the numbers below are expressed; echoed in the estimate label

currency.description: label only; the tool does no conversion

models.description: modelId -> per-type unit prices; any omitted type is treated as unpriced for that model
